title: Chunks fade in
description: A simple mod that adds fade-in animation for chunks!
body: [Sodium]: https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium [Smooth Chunks]: https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-chunks [ChunkAnimator]: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chunk-animator [Fabric]: https://fabricmc.net [Optifine]: https://www.optifine.net [Fade In Chunks]: https://modrinth.com/mod/fade-in-chunks [Iris]: https://modrinth.com/mod/iris [Sinytra Connector]: https://modrinth.com/mod/connector [Embeddium]: https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium [Crowdin]: https://crowdin.com/project/chunks-fade-in [Distant Horizons]: https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1052166699924856852?style=for-the-badge&color=informational&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/fPbPhrQNSz) [![Crowdin](https://img.shields.io/badge/crowdin-help%20with%20translations-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=crowdin)](https://crowdin.com/project/chunks-fade-in) # Description This mod adds smooth fade-in and motion animations for chunk loading, like in Minecraft Bedrock Edition and [ChunkAnimator], plus other unique features. It works seamlessly with [Sodium], (mostly) [Distant Horizons] and (mostly) [Iris]. No more chunks appearing right in front of you out of nowhere! ## Supported Minecraft versions - 1.18.x - 1.19.x - 1.20.x - 1.21.x ## Actively maintained versions (may be extended) - 1.20.1 (LTS) - 1.21.1 (LTS) - 1.21.6-1.21.8 - 1.21.9-1.21.10 - 1.21.11 ## Supported mod loaders - Fabric (all) - NeoForge (1.21+) - Forge (1.20.1) ## Dependencies (may work with other versions) - [Sodium] 0.5.13 or [Embeddium] 0.3.31 - 1.20.1 - [Sodium] 0.6.13 or [Embeddium] 1.0.15 - 1.21.1 - [Sodium] 0.7.3 - 1.21.6-1.21.10 - [Sodium] 0.8.2 - 1.21.11 # Features ## Showcase ## Flexible config with Mod Menu support! ## FAQ ### Is Vanilla/OptiFine supported or planned? No, please use [Sodium] (or NeoForge forks of it, like [Embeddium]).
